description_long: This shotgun features a robust double-barrel configuration with both barrels aligned horizontally, giving it a classic side-by-side appearance. The barrels are matte black and extend from a metallic receiver that appears slightly textured and reinforced. The receiver is connected to a wooden grip and handle, which is smoothly contoured and finished in a dark brown, suggesting a traditional design. The trigger guard is metallic and rounded, enclosing a single trigger and providing a secure grip area. The hammer and rear sight are visible above the receiver, indicating a manually operated action. Overall, the shotgun combines metal and wood materials, with a utilitarian yet classic aesthetic suitable for urban or historical settings.
description: A side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a matte black finish, metallic receiver, and a dark wooden grip. The design is classic and robust, featuring a rounded trigger guard and visible hammer.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin barrels aligned horizontally and the muzzle openings.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the barrels, metallic receiver, wooden grip, and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the wooden grip, trigger guard, and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the barrels, receiver, and wooden grip from the opposite side.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, barrels of equal length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metallic guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
